RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF THOMAS HILL's motion To Amendment To Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF THOMAS HILL'S MOTION TO (FILE) AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT is Continued to April 9, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 10, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
